allies.rationale_text: Feynman-technique helps johari-window expose what someone only thinks they know by making understanding simple enough to fail visibly.
allies.source_quote: Combining the Johari principle ... with the Feynman Technique ... provides a robust way to ensure genuine comprehension and overcome the tendency to believe you know more than you do.

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps johari-window treat blind spots as recurring coordination failures in the whole group, not just as isolated personality flaws.
allies.source_quote: It helps build the capacity of the organization to manage itself in the future.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines johari-window when feedback intake is filtered to protect the current self-image.
antagonists.source_quote: johari-window conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when feedback intake is filtered to protect existing self-image.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Johari-window conflicts with active-listening when disclosure mapping becomes performative and suppresses real dialogue repair.
structured_tensions.source_quote: johari-window vs active-listening: johari-window conflicts with active-listening (active listening) when disclosure mapping becomes performative and suppresses real dialogue repair.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Johari-window conflicts with confirmation-bias when feedback intake is filtered to protect existing self-image.
structured_tensions.source_quote: johari-window vs confirmation-bias: johari-window conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when feedback intake is filtered to protect existing self-image.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on blind-spot reduction, external calibration, and two clean current-vocabulary tension blocks around performative openness and protected self-image.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor self-awareness relation sprawl beyond the cleaner calibration, explanation, and explicit tension surface.
open_questions: Outside-view is source-real ally pressure too, but the retained set favors the stronger currently curated explanation and system-learning targets.
